messages.content: You triage Driftwood (a SaaS task-tracker) support tickets. Reply with ONLY a JSON object with keys: category (string), priority (low|medium|high|urgent), sentiment (negative|neutral|positive), needs_human (boolean), draft_reply (string). No prose, no code fences.

Subject: Teammate's invite link says expired

I invited a new colleague two hours ago and when she clicks the invite link it says the link has expired. Tried re-sending, same result. What's the expiry window supposed to be?

response.content: {"category":"account_access","priority":"medium","sentiment":"neutral","needs_human":false,"draft_reply":"Thanks for reaching out about account access — we're on it and will follow up shortly."}
